title: Efficacy and safety of GLP-1RAs for people with obesity: A systematic review based on RCT and Bayesian network meta-analysis

L2: GLP-1 receptor agonists show significant efficacy for weight reduction in obese patients
Bayesian network meta-analysis compares multiple GLP-1RA drugs for obesity treatment
L3: Systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis evaluating the efficacy and safety of GLP-1 receptor agonists including semaglutide, liraglutide, and tirzepatide for obesity treatment based on randomized controlled trials
